title: Join Me At Info-Tech LIVE This June in Las Vegas
summary: Alex Kantrowitz is speaking at Info-Tech LIVE (June 9-11, 2026 in Las Vegas) on career pivots and paths to leadership. The event features sessions on turning AI investment into business value and building AI strategy and roadmap for CIOs and senior IT leaders.
